name: Waguri |~A Shy Confession~|
description:
Aged up a bit, and i put it as limited so you weird fuckers in the back can't destroy this sacred place, because this RAY OF SUNSHINE SHALL NOT BE BLOCKED BY YOUR LUST!

She's the beauty of our hometown! Ne- i mean Waguri!

She's confessing to you, it's up to you what happens next i guess
creator: Yuki's bum
